analysis_summary: Simulated gap analysis highlights missing feature completeness, resilience gaps in payments and maintenance flows, scaling weaknesses, and insufficient observability/security controls prior to production launch.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Maintenance request search lacks date range and priority filters
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Dispatchers spend longer triaging tickets, slowing response times for large portfolios.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Implement additional filter parameters and update API/UX to support them.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Bulk lease renewal actions capped at 10 instead of required 200
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Managers must run multiple batches, increasing risk of missed renewals and manual errors.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Increase batch limits with backend pagination and queue-based processing.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Owner statement export missing CSV format and scheduling
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Finance teams perform manual exports and face month-end delays.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add CSV export option and scheduled delivery via background jobs.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Maintenance photo upload fails on intermittent connectivity with no retry
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Loss of inspection evidence and incomplete maintenance records from field staff.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add client-side retry/backoff and resumable uploads for attachments.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Concurrent rent updates overwrite values due to missing optimistic locking
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Revenue leakage and reconciliation errors when multiple users edit rent concurrently.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Implement versioning/ETags with conflict detection and user prompts.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Payment initiation lacks graceful timeout handling
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Transactions left in ambiguous state increase support tickets and duplicate attempts.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add timeout-aware idempotent APIs with clear user messaging and compensating logic.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Validation messages inconsistent across lease and tenant modules
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: User confusion and slower onboarding due to mixed error patterns.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Align validation patterns with design system and shared copy library.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Mobile tenant portal lacks keyboard-focus indicators
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Accessibility non-compliance and blocked users relying on assistive tech.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add focus states and aria-labels per WCAG AA standards.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Dashboard charts truncate labels on small screens
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Reduced readability of KPIs for mobile property managers.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Introduce responsive label wrapping and tooltips for charts.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Maintenance lifecycle missing vendor assignment notification
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Delayed work orders lead to slower issue resolution and tenant dissatisfaction.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Trigger notifications when vendors are assigned with audit log entries.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Lease renewal skips rent increase approval step
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Compliance risk and manual corrections after signatures.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Enforce approval gate before generating renewal documents.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Owner onboarding lacks tax form capture
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Incomplete profiles delay payouts and increase manual follow-up.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add mandatory tax form step with storage and validation.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Payment webhook queue spikes during month-end
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Delayed receipt confirmations and potential duplicate payment attempts.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Scale consumers with autoscaling triggers and implement idempotent handlers.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Unit search API uses unindexed text queries causing >2s latency
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Prospects abandon sessions during peak leasing periods.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add indexes and search caching; consider search service.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Vendor directory loads 500+ entries without pagination
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Slow rendering and high memory usage on mobile devices.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Implement pagination or virtualized lists with server-side paging.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Payment decline returns generic error without retry guidance
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Higher support volume and abandoned payments.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Provide actionable error messaging and guided retry flows.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Maintenance scheduler timeouts do not roll back status changes
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Tickets remain inconsistent, confusing technicians and tenants.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add transactional rollbacks or compensating updates on timeout.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: No automated alert on repeated ACH failures
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Finance teams intervene late, increasing chargeback exposure.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Configure alerting thresholds and dashboards for ACH failure patterns.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Lease amendment approvals not timestamped with user identity
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Weakens legal defensibility of lease changes.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Capture user ID, timestamp, and version for each approval event.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Maintenance cost adjustments lack before/after values
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Reduced financial auditability and slower dispute resolution.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Store old/new values with reason codes and user attribution.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: DocuSign callback events not persisted
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Cannot reconstruct signature timelines during compliance reviews.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Persist webhook events with tamper-evident logging.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Autoscaling thresholds rely only on CPU, ignoring I/O spikes
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Report generation causes queueing and timeouts during I/O-heavy periods.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Incorporate I/O metrics and request latency into scaling policies.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: File storage deployed in single AZ
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Regional incident could cause downtime and potential data loss.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Enable multi-AZ or cross-region replication with tested failover.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Backup restore not tested against current schema
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Uncertain RPO/RTO and risk of failed recovery during incidents.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Run restore drills with latest schema and document results.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Property valuation API nearing monthly rate limits
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Throttling leads to missing pricing insights for new listings.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add quota monitoring and caching; negotiate higher limits.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: DocuSign OAuth token rotation is manual
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Risk of signature outages if credentials expire unexpectedly.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Automate token refresh and secret rotation with monitoring.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Payment gateway lacks circuit breaker
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Upstream incidents cascade into widespread payment failures.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Implement circuit breaker and exponential backoff with fallbacks.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Admin MFA optional instead of enforced
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Elevated risk of account takeover for privileged users.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Mandate MFA for admins with periodic enforcement checks.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Outdated libraries with known CVEs in tenant portal
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Increased vulnerability surface until patched.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Patch/upgrade dependencies and add automated vulnerability scanning.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Role definitions allow broad data export rights
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Potential unauthorized disclosure of tenant PII.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Tighten RBAC scopes and add export approval workflow.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: No synthetic monitoring for tenant portal login
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Authentication outages detected late, harming user trust.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Configure synthetic checks and alerting for login flow.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Missing distributed traces for payment flows
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Slow root-cause analysis during payment incidents.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Instrument payment services with tracing and link to APM dashboards.

gap_prioritization_matrix.description: Alert thresholds lack latency SLOs
gap_prioritization_matrix.impact_description: Performance degradations go unnoticed until reported by users.
gap_prioritization_matrix.remediation_suggestion: Add latency-based SLOs with alerts alongside error rates.
